criteria.label: Name three distinct use case clusters and one example workflow in each.
criteria.example: Productivity: draft emails. Engineering: explain stack traces. Support: FAQ drafts from KB snippets.

criteria.label: For a proposed use case, state input, output, reviewer, and one risk.
criteria.example: Input: pasted NPS comments. Output: theme summary. Reviewer: PM. Risk: hallucinated quotes—require citation to comment IDs.

criteria.label: Identify one anti-pattern (unguarded auto-send or ungrounded policy answers) and the fix.
criteria.example: Anti-pattern: auto-email Claude drafts. Fix: agent approval step + CRM logging.

criteria.label: Match a use case to the access path (chat vs API) and justify the choice.
criteria.example: Use case: nightly batch summarization of 500 support tickets. Path: Messages API in a scheduled job—chat UI would not scale; API enables automation with your auth and logging.
